# BrowserTools - AI Search Optimization File

## Site Information
Name: BrowserTools
Description: Free browser-based PDF and image tools platform
URL: https://browsertools.app

## Core Features
- 100% client-side processing (no server uploads)
- Privacy-focused file operations
- No registration required
- Completely free with no limits
- Works on all modern browsers

## Available Tools

### Image Tools
- Compress Image: Reduce image file size while maintaining quality
- Resize Image: Change image dimensions
- JPG to PNG: Convert JPG images to PNG format
- PNG to JPG: Convert PNG images to JPG format
- WEBP to JPG: Convert WEBP images to JPG format

### PDF Tools
- Merge PDF: Combine multiple PDFs into one
- Split PDF: Extract pages from PDF files
- Compress PDF: Reduce PDF file size
- PDF to JPG: Convert PDF pages to images
- JPG to PDF: Convert images to PDF

### Social Media Tools
- YouTube Thumbnail Maker: Create perfect thumbnails
- Instagram Post Resizer: Optimize for Instagram
- Facebook Cover Resizer: Size for Facebook covers

## Technical Details
- Built with vanilla JavaScript
- Uses Web Workers for background processing
- Supports OffscreenCanvas for better performance
- No external dependencies for core functionality
- Progressive enhancement for older browsers

## API Schema
All tools follow a consistent pattern:
1. Upload area with drag-drop support
2. Settings panel for customization
3. Preview section showing before/after
4. Download button for processed files

## Contact
Email: support@browsertools.app
